title: Mildly Medicated Tunisian Herbal Tea Confit
description: A soothing, chewy herbal tea-based confit perfect for a sick day. This recipe combines the unique flavors of Sichuan pepper with traditional Tunisian herbs.

ingredients.name: Fresh mint leaves
ingredients.notes: Choose peppermint or spearmint for best flavor

ingredients.name: Fresh chamomile flowers
ingredients.notes: Calming and soothing for a sick day

instructions: Combine Sichuan peppercorns and water in a clay pot or saucepan. Heat over medium heat, then remove from heat and let steep for 10 minutes.
Strain the peppercorns from the tea and discard the peppercorns.
Add the fresh mint leaves, lemon balm leaves, and chamomile flowers to the tea. Let steep for another 5 minutes.
Strain the tea into a large bowl, discarding the solids.
Add the honey to taste, if desired. Stir to combine.
Heat the Tunisian olive oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the salt to the oil and stir to combine.
Pour the oil mixture over the tea and stir to combine.
Transfer the tea mixture to a bento box or individual serving containers.
Cover the box and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional fresh herbs if desired.
